summary: The implementation successfully delivers a professional crypto trading chart with candlestick visualization, timeframe selector (15m, 1h, 4h, 8h, 1w, 1m, 1y), and metric cards with historical chart toggles. All five requirements are implemented with real trading data from CoinGecko and ICPTokens.net APIs, professional trading UI aesthetics, and proper data caching.

hallucinated_features.description: Multi-source price data aggregation from ICPTokens.net, CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, and IC Dashboard with automatic fallback strategy
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest specified CoinGecko or similar public API but did not request multi-source aggregation with fallback logic. The diff shows composite price calculations from multiple sources in useQueries.ts.

hallucinated_features.description: Interactive zoom functionality with ReferenceArea and zoom reset buttons on the candlestick chart
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-5 required grid lines, axis labels, timeline markers, and tooltips but did not request zoom/pan functionality. The diff shows refAreaLeft, refAreaRight, zoomState, and zoom reset implementation.

hallucinated_features.description: Side-by-side trading metrics panel showing market cap, 24h volume, and 7d volume within the chart card
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 requested metric cards with toggles for historical charts, but not a separate metrics panel embedded within the main chart component. The diff shows a metrics panel in ICPPriceChart.tsx.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module for backend data structure upgrades with OldActor to NewActor transformation
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constraint specified preserving existing backend Motoko actor architecture but did not request migration functionality. The diff shows a new migration.mo file.

hallucinated_features.description: Transparent volume bars overlaid on the candlestick chart
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 specified OHLC candlestick data but did not request volume overlay visualization. The diff shows volume bar implementation in ICPPriceChart.tsx.
